channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Phillies Ace Zack Wheeler Keeps His Removed Rib in a Closet. Seriously!
item.description: After September surgery to remove a blood clot and part of a rib, Phillies pitcher Zack Wheeler decided to hold onto a keepsake.

item.title: Dabble Promo Code FOX: $10 No Deposit Bonus for New Users
item.description: Use promo code 'FOX' on Dabble Fantasy to get a $10 No-Deposit Bonus. Sign up free, copy top picks, and start playing today — no payment needed.

item.title: 2026 NASCAR Cup Series Predictions: Kevin Harvick Talks Breakout Stars, Cup Champ
item.description: Who will win the 2026 Cup Series? Kevin Harvick, Bob Pockrass and Mamba Smith were all over the map with their predictions.

item.title: theScore Bet Promo Code: Bet $10, Get $100 If Your Bet Wins
item.description: Claim the latest theScore Bet promo code and unlock a Bet $10, Get $100 bonus if your first wager wins. Offer available to new users in eligible state...

item.title: World Cup Watch: USA's MLS-Based Players Know There's 'No Time To Sit Around'
item.description: Reading. A data diary. Yoga. How MLS players eyeing a World Cup spot for the USA are trying to stay ready.

item.title: Slovakia stuns Finland to open men's hockey play
item.description: Juraj Slafkovsky scored twice to pick up where he left off four years ago as Slovakia pulled off an upset in the first men's hockey game of the Milan ...

item.title: Wasserman stays as LA28 chair after files review
item.description: Casey Wasserman's job as chairman of the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics organizing committee is safe after the board's executive committee met to discuss h...

item.title: Ex-Jets LB jailed without bond on murder charge
item.description: A judge on Wednesday kept former Jets first-round draft pick Darron Lee in jail without bond as he faces a first-degree murder charge in the death of ...

item.title: Falcons' DC 'disappointed' by Pearce arrest news
item.description: Falcons defensive coordinator Jeff Ulbrich said Wednesday that he was "obviously disappointed" by the news of edge rusher James Pearce Jr.'s arrest.

item.title: FanDuel to eliminate credit card deposits March 2
item.description: FanDuel Sportsbook will no longer accept deposits by credit cards beginning March 2.
